title: dodecatheon meadia subsp. brachycarpum
intro: Dodecatheon meadia subsp. brachycarpum, also known as the western or short-flowered showy pulmonaria, is a flowering plant species native to western North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dodecatheon meadia subsp. brachycarpum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
